'''鈭歫-sh-k''' ('''jashaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:handicap|handicap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:handicap|handicap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-sh-k
|-
! Lemma
| jashaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jashakithi|jashakithi]] || [[word:jashakiji|jashakiji]] || [[word:jashakishi|jashakishi]] || [[word:jashaki|jashaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jashakuthuth|jashakuthuth]] || [[word:jashakujuj|jashakujuj]] || [[word:jashakushush|jashakushush]] || [[word:jashak|jashak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jashakuthu|jashakuthu]] || [[word:jashakuju|jashakuju]] || [[word:jashakushu|jashakushu]] || [[word:jashaku|jashaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jashakufuth|jashakufuth]] || [[word:jashakufuj|jashakufuj]] || [[word:jashakufush|jashakufush]] || [[word:jashakuf|jashakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jashakethe|jashakethe]] || [[word:jashakeje|jashakeje]] || [[word:jashakeshe|jashakeshe]] || [[word:jashake|jashake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jashakothoth|jashakothoth]] || [[word:jashakojoj|jashakojoj]] || [[word:jashakoshosh|jashakoshosh]] || [[word:jashak|jashak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jashakotho|jashakotho]] || [[word:jashakojo|jashakojo]] || [[word:jashakosho|jashakosho]] || [[word:jashako|jashako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jashakofoth|jashakofoth]] || [[word:jashakofoj|jashakofoj]] || [[word:jashakofosh|jashakofosh]] || [[word:jashakof|jashakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jashak忙th忙|jashak忙th忙]] || [[word:jashak忙j忙|jashak忙j忙]] || [[word:jashak忙sh忙|jashak忙sh忙]] || [[word:jashak忙|jashak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jashakathath|jashakathath]] || [[word:jashakajaj|jashakajaj]] || [[word:jashakashash|jashakashash]] || [[word:jashak|jashak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jashakatha|jashakatha]] || [[word:jashakaja|jashakaja]] || [[word:jashakasha|jashakasha]] || [[word:jashaka|jashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jashakafath|jashakafath]] || [[word:jashakafaj|jashakafaj]] || [[word:jashakafash|jashakafash]] || [[word:jashakaf|jashakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jashakasha|jashakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojashakasha|gojashakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijashakasha|gokijashakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jashakn眉sha|jashakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojashaknkn眉sha|gojashaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijashakn眉sha|gokijashakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jashaksh毛sha|jashaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojashaknksh毛sha|gojashaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijashaksh毛sha|gokijashaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jashakrosha|jashakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojashaknkrosha|gojashaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijashakrosha|gokijashakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jashakmusha|jashakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojashaknkmusha|gojashaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijashakmusha|gokijashakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jashaksherasha|jashaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojashaknksherasha|gojashaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijashaksherasha|gokijashaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jashakngasha|jashakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojashaknkngasha|gojashaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijashakngasha|gokijashakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jashakyasha|jashakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojashaknkyasha|gojashaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijashakyasha|gokijashakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jashakyamasha|jashakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojashaknkyamasha|gojashaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijashakyamasha|gokijashakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jashakn眉sh毛sha|jashakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojashaknkn眉sh毛sha|gojashaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijashakn眉sh毛sha|gokijashakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jashakn眉rosha|jashakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojashaknkn眉rosha|gojashaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijashakn眉rosha|gokijashakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jashakn眉musha|jashakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojashaknkn眉musha|gojashaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijashakn眉musha|gokijashakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jashaksh毛n眉sha|jashaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojashaknksh毛n眉sha|gojashaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijashaksh毛n眉sha|gokijashaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jashaksh毛rosha|jashaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojashaknksh毛rosha|gojashaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijashaksh毛rosha|gokijashaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jashaksh毛musha|jashaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojashaknksh毛musha|gojashaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijashaksh毛musha|gokijashaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jashakron眉sha|jashakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojashaknkron眉sha|gojashaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijashakron眉sha|gokijashakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jashakrosh毛sha|jashakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojashaknkrosh毛sha|gojashaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijashakrosh毛sha|gokijashakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jashakromusha|jashakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojashaknkromusha|gojashaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijashakromusha|gokijashakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jashakmun眉sha|jashakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojashaknkmun眉sha|gojashaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijashakmun眉sha|gokijashakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jashakmush毛sha|jashakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojashaknkmush毛sha|gojashaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijashakmush毛sha|gokijashakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jashakmurosha|jashakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojashaknkmurosha|gojashaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijashakmurosha|gokijashakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jashak|jashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:j忙sh忙k|j忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojashak|hojashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoj忙sh忙k|hoj忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojashak|hohojashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoj忙sh忙k|hohoj忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉jashak|n眉jashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉j忙sh忙k|n眉j忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉jashak|n眉n眉jashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉j忙sh忙k|n眉n眉j忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂jashak|n茂jashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂j忙sh忙k|n茂j忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂jashak|n茂n茂jashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂j忙sh忙k|n茂n茂j忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujashak|lujashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luj忙sh忙k|luj忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujashak|lulujashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluj忙sh忙k|luluj忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijashak|lijashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lij忙sh忙k|lij忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijashak|lilijashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilij忙sh忙k|lilij忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojashak|kojashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koj忙sh忙k|koj忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojashak|kokojashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoj忙sh忙k|kokoj忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejashak|kejashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kej忙sh忙k|kej忙sh忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejashak|kekejashak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekej忙sh忙k|kekej忙sh忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
